pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and evaluation scripts consistently specify this as the required target output path.
Task description, setup_task.sh, and evaluation scripts consistently specify this as the required target output path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a PsychoPy experiment saved to '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/visual_search_experiment.psyexp' and a conditions CSV file saved to '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/visual_search_conditions.csv'. There is no pre-existing dataset as the agent is expected to build the experiment from scratch.
